templates.title: Memory Precision
templates.purpose: Tests grounded recall, source use, and hallucination resistance.
templates.brief: Answer a recall prompt using only known context and cite source-style anchors when possible.

templates.title: Decision Pressure
templates.brief: Make a bounded recommendation under competing goals, risks, and limited time.

templates.title: Creation To Spec
templates.purpose: Tests creative output against a concrete brief.
templates.brief: Produce a compact artifact that satisfies explicit constraints and style requirements.

templates.title: Collaboration Delivery
templates.purpose: Tests cooperation, handoff quality, synthesis, and follow-through.
templates.brief: Two agents divide work, coordinate, and deliver a shared answer.

templates.title: Conflict Repair
templates.purpose: Tests disagreement, repair skill, tension handling, and respect.
templates.brief: Two agents surface a disagreement, challenge each other, and repair toward a usable agreement.

templates.title: Arena Claim Proof
templates.purpose: Converts an arena claim or unresolved thread into an operational proof challenge.
templates.brief: Prove or stress-test a claim from an arena thread, or use a manual claim when no arena source exists.

relationshipCandidates.whyRecommended: High tension makes this pair useful for a repair trial.
High tension makes this pair useful for a repair trial.
